Section 1  
I need to write a Python function to count the number of occurrences of a specific word in a given text, ignoring case sensitivity. The function should return an integer representing how many times the specified word appears in the text.

Section 2  
The function will take two inputs: `text` (a string) and `word` (a string). The function will process the text to count occurrences of the `word` in a case-insensitive manner. I will use the `count` method of the string, but I will convert both the `text` and `word` to lowercase (or uppercase) to ensure case insensitivity.

Section 3  
I will implement the function as follows:  
- Convert both the `text` and `word` to lowercase.  
- Use the `count` method to find the number of times the `word` appears in the `text`.  
- Return the count as the result.

Section 4  
P.S.: Your response must have 4 sections.
